name: Nagantaka
description: Slash targets with a single precise bolt from Garuda's signature crossbow. Alt-fire to let loose a barrage of bolts. All bolts have a chance to cause <DT_SLASH_COLOR>Slash Status, and Headshots have a chance to increase Reload Speed. When wielded by Garuda Nagantaka gains a slight Punch Through.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Slash targets with a single precise bolt from Garuda's signature crossbow. Alt-fire to let loose a barrage of bolts. All bolts have a chance to cause <DT_SLASH_COLOR>Slash Status, and Headshots have a chance to increase Reload Speed. When wielded by Garuda Nagantaka gains a slight Punch Through.

components.name: Gallium
components.description:
Soft metal used in microelectronics and energy weapons.

Location: Mars and Uranus

components.name: Nano Spores
components.description:
Fibrous technocyte tumour. Handle Infested tissue with caution.

Location: Saturn, Neptune, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Neurodes
components.description:
Biotech sensor organ harvested from Infested entities.

Location: Earth, Lua, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Rubedo
components.description:
A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

Location: Earth, Lua, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, and the Void

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Nagantaka Prime not applying custom colors to the crossbow string.

patchlogs.name: Garuda Prime: Hotfix 31.3.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Nagantaka Prime missing its own Riven Disposition number. 
It was using the Nagantaka Disposition instead of starting at 0.5 like all new weapons. Learn more about the Riven Disposition Guidelines here.

patchlogs.name: Garuda Prime: Update 31.3
patchlogs.changes: Awash in crimson and shimmering gold, Garuda Prime has emerged! Add Garuda Prime, exclusive Prime Accessories, Weapons, Boosters and more with Prime Access, or earn Relics in-game to craft Garuda Prime, Nagantaka Prime and Corvas Prime in your Foundry.

patchlogs.name: Update 28: The Deadlock Protocol
patchlogs.changes: Polished and tweaked Nagantaka's firing animation to reduce possible motion blur issues.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.2 + 25.0.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some weapons (Cyanex, Nagantaka) Fire Rates on their Burst mode showing as 0.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Update 24.6.0
patchlogs.additions: Added a custom icon for Nagantaka's reload speed buff.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.7 + 24.2.7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Nagantaka not appearing properly in the Market diorama.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Update 24.0
patchlogs.changes: Find the Nagantaka Blueprint in the Market.
